steps.title: Identify the discovery verb
steps.content: The sentence says maize does not closely resemble any wild plant, and genetic research only recently identified its ancestor as teosinte grass. The blank needs a verb that means uncovered or discovered and that fits naturally before the phrase about the ancestor.

steps.title: Reject mismatched verbs
steps.content: Choice B cannot logically describe research making an ancestor larger. Choice C would mean research persuaded an ancestor to do something. Choice D would mean research formally requested something from the ancestor. The remaining verb describes uncovering the ancestor's identity. The answer is A.
